room.caption: [NH4] Claire's Room

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=88 newMapY=272 toRoom=rExtGateH_6 image_xscale=2 newArrowPosX=8

noteType=1 noteToRead="There is a way out of here. The window in your room is the way to your freedom.
If you can find the heart shaped key, you will have your freedom and your life back.
-?????"
if global.gateHProg>=4 {instance_destroy()}
